extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won the 35km pan-flat time trial by 1 second over THOMAS Geraint, regaining the maglia rosa with a 45-second GC lead.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL started fastest, built 30+ second gap early on ROGLIC, then held advantages despite negative split from chasers.
ROGLIC employed deliberate slow-start negative-split strategy, clawing back 11+ seconds but insufficient for TT specialists on flat parcours.
HART outperformed GC expectations finishing third, only 4 seconds off winner, revealing unexpected flat TT strength for climber type.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: regained maglia rosa with front-loaded pacing strategy holding off stronger finishers, 45s GC buffer established
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: missed stage win by fraction of second, only 45s down GC suggests genuine podium threat despite age
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: negative split strategy limited losses to 47s but reveals flat TT weakness against pure specialists
rider_signals.HART Tao Gaughan: positive: third place 4s back shocks as climbing specialist, sits 59s down GC as dark horse
rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: negative: second-fastest early time beaten by teammates suggests Ineos depth but individual vulnerability in closing kilometers
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: lost rosa as expected but stays within 3 minutes, limited TT damage control successful
